prompts: /plan "update the plan to use only icons with tooltips for the buttons: 'post all', 'export csv', and 'delete'. The checkbox should be in the top right corner of the property card. The 'scroll to top' button is not showing up. Include a pause and resume button for the scrape listings."

update plan specs/refine-scraped-properties-ui-bulk-actions-scroll-pause-resume.md. put the select/unselect button back into the scraped properties page. The checkbox needs to be in the top right corner of the real estate listing card. The floating scroll to top button in the list is still missing. Reduce the height of the sidebar to match the hight of the bulk action panel so we don't have a vertical scrollbar. Fix the browser console errors:  [PropFlow] Service worker initializing
